title: jacobaea pulicariiformis
intro: Jacobaea pulicariiformis, also known as the ragwort, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Jacobaea pulicariiformis are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
